raw_consumer_statement: I was scheduled for a cosmetic XXXX at XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX, La my schedule procedure in XX/XX/year> in which I did not go through with the XXXX. I was charged the total amount for procedure to my Best Buy Credit Card so I disputed the charges twice uploaded information showing it was only a {$500.00} non refundable deposit but I was charged {$5700.00} in addition to the {$500.00} deposit no XXXX was done or performed. I was told since I provided this information there should be no reason why I would be responsible for charges but after the end of this 6 months going back and forth the charge is still on my account.
